name: WW-White Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons olive oil or vegetable oil
4 ounces drained canned small white beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 or 2 quart saucepan, heat the oil.
2. Add carrot, celery, onion, and garlic. Cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in water, tomato sauce, basil leaves, salt, thyme, pepper, and beans.
4. Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat and let simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in parsley. Cook until thoroughly heated, about 5 more minutes.
6. Serve each portion with 1 teaspoon of parsley sprinkled on top.
Each serving provides: 1 protein exchange; 2 1/4 vegetable exchanges; 1 fat exchange
Per Serving: 153 calories; 6 g protein; 5 g fat; 22 g carbohydrate; 811 mg sodium (estimated); 0 mg cholesterol.
